response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue is manually transcribed; song lyrics phonetically match the provided Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON used for song lyrics; dialogue was manually transcribed as the JSON was incomplete for the talking segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts; aggressive truncation used for rapid-fire dialogue in the carriage scene. Visual text for the 'Dropped Out of School Musical' intro is included.

subtitles.original: Wait, I guess we already have that.
subtitles.english: Wait, I guess we already have that.
I cannot afford friends.

subtitles.original: Wait, what else do we need?
subtitles.english: Wait, what else do we need?
We need to sell out.
We need to sell out.

subtitles.original: Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.
subtitles.english: Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.

subtitles.original: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Immergreen.
subtitles.english: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Immergreen.
Like what?
Every genre.

subtitles.original: I think that's the only way.
subtitles.english: I think that's the only way.
You're already kind of...
What?
Huh?
Where... Where are we?
Gigi? Where...
What is this?
What is this?
Are we in my head?

subtitles.original: Wait, are we in your head?
subtitles.english: Wait, are we in your head?
Are we in my head?

subtitles.original: What... this is just like fiction.
subtitles.english: What... this is just like fiction.
This is just like fiction!

subtitles.original: Does that mean we're gonna steal people's ideas?
subtitles.english: Does that mean we're gonna steal people's ideas?
Oh no, they're my ideas.
We're in my head.

subtitles.original: Wait, but this is my head!
subtitles.english: Wait, but this is my head!
I'm gonna steal your idea!
You can't steal my ideas.
I could!
Wait, what if... No!

subtitles.original: What if I see every single idea that's in your head...
subtitles.english: What if I see every single idea that's in your head...

subtitles.original: ...and then I take them from you and then I kill you?
subtitles.english: ...and then I take them from you and then I kill you?
Stop! You're taking my idea!

subtitles.original: If you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi part.
subtitles.english: If you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi part.
Oh... oh...

subtitles.original: Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay.
subtitles.english: Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay.
Wait, what's in your brain?
Nothing.

subtitles.original: Um, actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...
subtitles.english: Um, actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...

subtitles.original: Your brain is full of bad romance novels.
subtitles.english: Your brain is full of bad romance novels.

subtitles.original: We can't put that in our show!
subtitles.english: We can't put that in our show!
No! Yes we can!

subtitles.original: Yes we can put it in our show!
subtitles.english: Yes we can put it in our show!

subtitles.original: Yes, let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Yes, let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!
Romance, hmm, romance.
Romance.

subtitles.original: I guess we need a break free out of this place.
subtitles.english: I guess we need a break free out of this place.
[Title: DROPPED OUT OF SCHOOL MUSICAL]

subtitles.original:
THE FOLLOWING SCENE IS AS FOLLOWS:
CROY AND GIBRIELLA ARE AT A PARTY.
CROY LOVES BASKETBALL
AND GIBRIELLA IS NOT LIKE OTHER GIRLS...
A FICTIONAL TALE OF SONG AND BASKETBALL.
subtitles.english:
[Scenario: Croy and Gibriella are at a party.
Croy loves basketball and Gibriella is not like other girls...
A fictional tale of song and basketball.]
I don't want to sing.
I'm just a normal boy.

subtitles.original: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game.
subtitles.english: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game.

subtitles.original: I can't sing. I'm just Troy.
subtitles.english: I can't sing. I'm just Troy.
Get it together, Gibriella.

subtitles.original: We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college.
subtitles.english: We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college.

subtitles.original: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books.
subtitles.english: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい 子供なのね
subtitles.english: So foolish. You are a child.
Chased dreams and got hurt.
Even though you’re a bad at lies,
you showed me a humourless smile.

subtitles.original: I love youも ろくに言わない
subtitles.english: You can’t even say “I love you”.

subtitles.original: 口下手でほんまに不器用
subtitles.english: You’re really clumsy and bad with words.

subtitles.original: なのになのにどうして
subtitles.english: Even so, even so, why
could you say “goodbye”?

subtitles.original: だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
subtitles.english: This is no good. No good. No good at all.

subtitles.original: あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you too much.

subtitles.original: どれだけ 強いお酒でも
subtitles.english: No matter how strong the drink,

subtitles.original: 歪まない思い出が 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: the memories are never muddied; what a fool.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい 本当バカね
subtitles.english: So foolish. Truly stupid.

subtitles.original: あんた信じるばかりで
subtitles.english: All I did was believe in you;
pretending to be a strong woman,
showered in a sorrowful night wind.
